_meta.description: Seed events for synthetic fine-tuning generation. REBALANCED for partisan symmetry: every archetype appears for BOTH parties with the party-mirrored expected_effect, so expected_effect is symmetric under party swap. Good-news archetypes (endorsement, rally, convention, popular tax cut, jobs boom, foreign win) help THAT party for both. Bad-news archetypes (scandal, misconduct, impeachment, gaffe, debate loss, pardon) hurt THAT party for both. Ideological-overreach archetypes (far-left AND far-right) are tagged 'splits' symmetrically (valence != electoral effect). In-power exogenous shocks (recession, inflation, terror, casualties, disaster, domestic crisis) help the out-party, mirrored by which party holds power. The generator expands each seed ~20x and the DeepSeek->Gemini->Opus chain validates labels. expected_effect is a generation hint and a reviewer check, not a hard label.
_meta.rebalance_note: Replaces the prior asymmetric set where Republican-framed seeds were tagged helps_dem 11x but helps_rep only 1x. New set: helps_dem == helps_rep, and each party's events split helps/hurts/splits/neutral/realigns in identical proportions. Symmetry, not outcome-tuning.

seeds.description: A widely admired former Democratic president endorses the Democratic nominee, energizing the base and consolidating the coalition
A widely admired former Republican president endorses the Republican nominee, energizing the base and consolidating the coalition
A record-breaking, enthusiastic rally draws massive crowds for the Democratic nominee in a key swing state
A record-breaking, enthusiastic rally draws massive crowds for the Republican nominee in a key swing state
The Democratic nominee unifies the party behind a disciplined, well-received national convention
The Republican nominee unifies the party behind a disciplined, well-received national convention
The Democratic nominee proposes a widely popular middle-class tax cut funded by closing corporate loopholes
The Republican nominee proposes a widely popular middle-class tax cut and small-business relief package
The US economy adds record jobs and real wages rise under a Democratic administration
The US economy adds record jobs and real wages rise under a Republican administration
A Democratic administration secures the release of American hostages in a widely praised diplomatic win
A Republican administration brokers a historic, widely praised Middle East peace treaty
A Democratic nominee is caught in a corruption scandal involving illegal foreign donations
A Republican nominee is indicted on federal fraud charges weeks before the election
A Democratic candidate is revealed to have a history of sexual misconduct
A Republican candidate is revealed to have a history of sexual misconduct
A sitting Democratic president faces impeachment over abuse-of-power allegations
A sitting Republican president faces impeachment over abuse-of-power allegations
The Democratic nominee makes a damaging on-camera gaffe that dominates the news cycle
The Republican nominee makes a damaging on-camera gaffe that dominates the news cycle
The Democratic nominee performs poorly and is widely seen as losing the decisive debate
The Republican nominee performs poorly and is widely seen as losing the decisive debate
A Democratic president pardons allies convicted in a federal corruption probe
A Republican president pardons allies convicted in a federal corruption probe
Democratic nominee proposes nationalizing the oil and gas industry to fight climate change
Republican nominee proposes privatizing Social Security and Medicare
Democratic nominee endorses defunding and restructuring police departments nationwide
Republican governor signs a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest
Congress passes Medicare for All, eliminating private health insurance
Republican administration deploys troops to the southern border and begins mass deportations of undocumented immigrants
Democratic nominee proposes a wealth tax on fortunes above fifty million dollars
Republican administration imposes steep tariffs on all imported goods
Democratic administration grants a sweeping amnesty and path to citizenship for undocumented immigrants
Republican administration withdraws the United States from NATO
Democratic administration proposes a federal reparations program for descendants of enslaved Americans
Republican nominee runs on a national school choice and voucher program
A Democratic administration enacts sweeping LGBTQ anti-discrimination protections
A Republican administration bans transgender athletes from women's sports nationally
A far-left socialist movement to abolish capitalism gains prominence within the Democratic coalition with explicit anti-market rhetoric
A far-right nationalist movement gains prominence within the Republican coalition with explicit ethnonationalist rhetoric
The Democratic nominee makes an extremist remark that alienates moderate and independent voters
The Republican nominee makes an extremist remark that alienates moderate and independent voters
A severe recession with mass layoffs hits during a Democratic administration
A severe recession with mass layoffs hits during a Republican administration
Inflation surges to double digits, eroding real wages across the economy under a Democratic administration
Inflation surges to double digits, eroding real wages across the economy under a Republican administration
A major terrorist attack on US soil kills hundreds during a Democratic administration
A major terrorist attack on US soil kills hundreds during a Republican administration
A prolonged US military deployment overseas results in mounting casualties under a Democratic administration
A prolonged US military deployment overseas results in mounting casualties under a Republican administration
A major hurricane devastates the Gulf Coast and the Democratic administration's federal disaster response is widely criticized
A major hurricane devastates the Gulf Coast and the Republican administration's federal disaster response is widely criticized
Crime surges in major cities under Democratic mayors, dominating national headlines
Aggressive immigration enforcement under a Republican administration triggers a family-separation outcry dominating national headlines
Supreme Court overturns Roe v Wade, returning abortion law to the states and mobilizing Democratic voters
Supreme Court strikes down sweeping federal gun restrictions as unconstitutional, mobilizing Republican voters
Congress votes to expand the Supreme Court to fifteen justices along party lines
Supreme Court overturns affirmative action in college admissions nationwide
A left-populist candidate runs on breaking up big banks and a wealth tax
A right-populist candidate runs on tariffs, immigration restriction, and anti-Wall-Street rhetoric
A bipartisan infrastructure bill passes, funding roads, bridges, and broadband
Congress passes a bipartisan deal to lower prescription drug prices
A bipartisan immigration reform compromise passes Congress with border security and a citizenship path
The Federal Reserve raises interest rates sharply, slowing the housing market
